changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO evaluator_delegations (id, evaluatee_id, original_evaluator_id, delegated_to_id, valid_from, valid_to, reason, created_by, created_at, is_active) VALUES (1, 12, 5, 3, '2026-04-15', '2026-04-25', 'Отпуск руководителя', 1, '2026-04-10 10:00:00', true), (2, 19, 10, 7, '2026-05-08', '2026-05-20', 'Командировка', 1, '2026-05-05 10:00:00', true);
